text:
Once upon an ordinary day, there was an owl named Owly.

O Owly loved owls. Ever since he could remember.

He liked watching them. Listening.

He talked to them.

One owl especially.

That owl was pale.

No feathers.

Just white.

That's how Owly liked her.

So one autumn.

O Owly chased her.

You know.

There she flew.

O Owly.

Now that's silly.

You wouldn broads.

Well I thought.

Let's have tea.

We snacked.

Oh my.

Then just laugh.

Like that.

That's fun.

You know.

Anyway.

What do I know.

There you go.

Best owl.

Even now.

Just you wait.

I'll think.

One day.

Something'll hap.

Now that'd be.

Even moody.


I'll know.

Sometimes... oh.

Maybe I'll write?

Then maybe they'd sing?

Just think.

O owls.

You know.

Anyway.



I'll draw.

O
